name: Hold The Bright Line
description: Declare: pick this unit if it is contesting a demo objective. Effect: add 1 to its control score until the end of the turn.
legend: The lamps are set in a perfect row.

name: Shield Chime
description: Declare: pick this unit when it is targeted by an attack. Effect: subtract 1 from the damage characteristic of one incoming weapon, to a minimum of 1.
legend: A single note tells every shield where to be.

name: Hook The Horizon
description: Declare: pick an enemy demo unit within 12 inches. Effect: that unit cannot finish a retreat move within 3 inches of this unit this phase.
legend: The line goes tight before anyone sees why.

name: Windstep
description: Effect: this unit can move across terrain features as if they were not there during a normal move.
legend: Every knot has a shortcut.

name: Set The Measure
description: Declare: pick an objective wholly within 12 inches. Effect: friendly Skyforge units contesting that objective add 1 to control until your next hero phase.
legend: The machine decides where the battle is balanced.

name: Counterweight Surge
description: Declare: pick this unit after it makes a charge move. Effect: roll a die; on a 3+, pick one enemy unit within 1 inch to suffer D3 sample damage.
legend: Momentum becomes a verdict.

name: Battle Damaged: Dragging Gears
description: Effect: while this unit has 7 or fewer health points remaining, subtract 1 from the attacks characteristic of its melee weapons.
legend: The engine remembers every dent.

name: Hot Marsh Sprint
description: Effect: this unit can run and still use shooting weapons this turn.
legend: Steam marks the safest road.

name: Lanceflare
description: Declare: pick this unit after it charged. Effect: add 1 to wound rolls for its melee weapons for the rest of the turn.
legend: The lance tips burn white for a heartbeat.

name: Read The Ash
description: Declare: pick one friendly Emberfen unit wholly within 12 inches. Effect: that unit can reroll one hit roll before your next hero phase.
legend: The ledger already knows the correction.

name: Footnote Of Denial
description: Declare: pick this unit when a visible enemy uses an ability. Effect: on a 4+, that ability has no effect on this unit.
legend: A careful note can ruin a dramatic moment.

name: Open The Dampers
description: Declare: pick this unit in your hero phase. Effect: until your next hero phase, add 1 to the attacks characteristic of its melee weapons.
legend: Heat becomes enthusiasm with a handle.

name: Pressure Wave
description: Declare: pick up to two enemy demo units within 3 inches. Effect: each picked unit has its move characteristic reduced by 1 until the end of the turn.
legend: Nobody enjoys standing near the boiler.

name: Cinder Vent
description: Declare: pick this unit after it takes damage. Effect: roll a die; on a 4+, one enemy unit within 6 inches suffers 1 sample damage.
legend: Loose plates vent sparks in every direction.

name: Battle Damaged: Cooling Core
description: Effect: while this unit has 8 or fewer health points remaining, subtract 2 inches from its move characteristic.
legend: The furnace still walks, but now it thinks about each step.

name: Lantern Wall
description: Declare: pick this unit if it did not move this turn. Effect: until your next movement phase, add 1 to save rolls for this unit.
legend: Light makes a wall if everyone agrees.

name: Measured Advance
description: Effect: this unit can ignore the first modifier to its move characteristic each turn.
legend: The map is drawn on the inside of every shield.

name: Diplomatic Refraction
description: Declare: pick this unit in your hero phase. Effect: pick one visible friendly unit within 12 inches; it can move 2 inches after this ability resolves.
legend: A polite angle changes the whole room.

name: Mirror Clause
description: Declare: pick this unit when it is picked as the target of a shooting attack. Effect: subtract 1 from hit rolls for that attack.
legend: The first answer is always reflected.

name: Raise The Beacon
description: Declare: pick one visible friendly Glimmerdeep unit. Effect: add 1 to hit rolls for that unit's shooting weapons until the end of the turn.
legend: The tower points and everyone understands.

name: Anchor Lamps
description: Effect: enemy demo units within 6 inches cannot use abilities that would move them more than 3 inches after deployment.
legend: The light pins every shadow to the floor.

name: Glasswork Recalibration
description: Declare: pick this unit in your hero phase. Effect: heal 1 sample damage allocated to this unit.
legend: A lens turns, and the crack becomes a line.

name: Battle Damaged: Shuttered Lens
description: Effect: while this unit has 6 or fewer health points remaining, subtract 1 from the attacks characteristic of its ranged weapons.
legend: The beacon still shines, but only through one good pane.
